incident.message: Very long vector path (913 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
Hardcoded string "1 June 2026", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Celestial Premium", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Shubh Muhurat", should use `@string` resource
Nested weights are bad for performance
Nested weights are bad for performance
This `LinearLayout` layout or its `LinearLayout` parent is unnecessary; transfer the `background` attribute to the other view

This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 31. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.

Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
This library supports using KSP instead of kapt, which greatly improves performance. Learn more: https://developer.android.com/studio/build/migrate-to-ksp

show-url.description: Learn about how to enable KSP and use the KSP processor for this dependency instead

incident.message: A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.13.1 is available: 1.19.0
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.7.0 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.12.0 is available: 1.14.0
A newer version of androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout than 2.1.4 is available: 2.2.1
A newer version of androidx.navigation:navigation-fragment-ktx than 2.7.7 is available: 2.9.8
A newer version of androidx.navigation:navigation-ui-ktx than 2.7.7 is available: 2.9.8

A newer version of com.android.billingclient:billing-ktx than 7.0.0 is available: 9.1.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-viewmodel-ktx than 2.8.1 is available: 2.11.0

Found bitmap drawable `res/drawable/inapp_logo.jpg` in densityless folder
Found bitmap drawable `res/drawable/splash_logo.jpg` in densityless folder
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
The following unrelated icon files have identical contents: inapp_logo.jpg, splash_logo.jpg, ic_launcher.jpg, inapp_logo.jpg, splash_logo.jpg
